messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.structure-independence.framework-foreclosure-large-operator-cell","queries":[{"query":"Schneider Electric Vertiv global framework agreement hyperscaler colocation rack PDU multi-year contract 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"CE-7 colocation operator rack PDU RFP 2026 vendor-open tender fit-out","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center operator OEM ODM rack integration PDU bundled procurement Europe","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.structure-independence.colo-weights-enterprise-slice-misallocation","queries":[{"query":"EUDCA country profiles installed IT load Germany Switzerland Netherlands MW 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Statista colocation capacity Netherlands Amsterdam metro share of national total 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"EUDCA Europe colocation hyperscale share of total data center IT power two-thirds","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.structure-independence.ce-hyperscale-global-split-mirage","queries":[{"query":"Synergy Research hyperscale data center capacity share Europe Ireland Netherlands Sweden 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"CBRE JLL hyperscale owned self-build data center capacity Germany Frankfurt share 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"hyperscaler leased colocation capacity Frankfurt Amsterdam campus tenant metering DCIM","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.structure-independence.stock-weighted-tam-misses-fitout-flow","queries":[{"query":"CBRE
